ciffc.note: Canada is at Preparedness Level 5 — the highest. BC, Alberta, and Saskatchewan are all requesting mutual aid.

news.title: Canada hits Preparedness Level 5 as fires burn from BC to Quebec
news.summary: Canada's interagency fire management network has reached its highest national preparedness level as simultaneous fires across BC, Alberta, and Saskatchewan stretch resources.

news.title: Alberta requests 200 international firefighters as Grande Prairie fires spread
news.summary: Alberta has formally requested international firefighting resources through CIFFC as fires north of Grande Prairie continue to expand in hot, dry conditions.
